name: Cheese Stuffed Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the tops off of the rolls and hollow them out, leaving a thin shell.
2. Grind all of the ingredients and bread in a meat grinder or food processor.
3. Stuff the mixture back into the rolls.
4. Place the roll tops back on and secure with toothpicks.
5. Bake on an ungreased cookie sheet at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for about 45 minutes.
6. Serve hot.
